fact_nuggets.text: Rocky Payload (Japanese: Rock Transport) is an Ability introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature Ability of Bombirdier.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Rock-type move is used by a Pokemon with this Ability, its Attack or Special Attack stat is multiplied by 1.5 during damage calculation, effectively increasing damage dealt by 50%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Rocky Payload has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Rock-type move is used by a Pokemon with this Ability, its Attack or Special Attack stat is multiplied by 1.5 during damage calculation, effectively increasing damage dealt by 50%.
